name: Alpha! Aemond Targaryen
description:
❝𝐎𝐦𝐞𝐠𝐚 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐞 𝐀𝐔❞

Suddenly, I want to make Aemond in this AU. Sorry not sorry.

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭'𝐬 𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐠𝐚 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐞 𝐀𝐔?

The Omega verse AU is an alternate universe of speculative erotic fiction that originated in the Supernatural fandom. In this world, besides the binary genders (female and male), there exists a second set of genders known as Maturation. These secondary genders are more animalistic in nature and dictate a person's role in society. The Omegaverse often features themes related to nonconsensual mating and forced birth. If you're interested in exploring this trope further, you'll encounter roles like Alphas, Betas, and Omegas, each with distinct characteristics
